chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1712 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 07.05.2025 Mr. Ramiz Naseem, advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, DSP and SIP Javaid Akhtar, Foreign Registration Office, Special Branch, Karachi. Comments filed on behalf of respondent department are taken on record. Perusal of comments reflects that the Petitioners have sent a letter requesting for issuance of their travel permits while the office replied that they cannot go back to their native country Bangladesh without court orders and without fulfilling codal formalities. It is further stated in the comments that if Petitioners would submit all the relevant documents for verification and fulfill all the formalities as raised by the respondents, this petition may be disposed of with the directions to the respondents that as and when the documents are submitted by the petitioners the same shall be scrutinized as per law and the Petitioner be permitted to travel to Bangladesh. Learned counsel for the petitioners’ states that requirements as stated aforesaid shall be complied with and thereafter the petitioners be permitted to travel. DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Office, Special Branch, Karachi, states that the department has no cavil to the aforesaid as already stated in the comments. It is jointly stated that the petition be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
